// NPC Loja de Consumíveis  
izlude,140,135,4	script	Mercador de Consumíveis#consumables	749,{  
    callshop "mercado_consumibles", 1;  
    end;  
}  
  
// Shop de consumíveis com IDs corretos  
-	shop	mercado_consumibles	-1,501:50,502:200,503:550,504:1200,505:5000,506:40,545:1000,546:3000,547:5000,522:8000,645:1200,656:2200,657:4500,11547:10000,11548:15000,11549:15000,12392:275,12393:625,12394:1375,12427:8000,12424:8000,12436:5000,12437:5000,12429:20000,12430:20000,12431:20000,12432:20000,12433:20000,12434:20000,12114:15000,12115:15000,12116:15000,12117:15000,12118:15000,12119:15000,12120:15000,12121:15000,22702:10,22703:10,22704:10,22705:10,22706:10,22707:10


// NPC Tool Dealer  
izlude,142,137,4	script	Mercador de Ferramentas#tooldealer	900,{  
    callshop "mercado_tools", 1;  
    end;  
}  
  
// Shop de ferramentas  
-	shop	mercado_tools	-1,714:100000,1010:200,1011:1000,984:5000,985:5000,612:150,7054:2000,1002:2000,998:2000,999:2000,756:2000,615:5000,100065:20000,100066:20000,100067:20000,100068:20000,100069:20000,100070:20000,100071:20000,100072:20000


// NPC Loja de Suprimentos  
izlude,144,139,4	script	Mercador de Suprimentos#supplies	99,{  
    callshop "mercado_supplies", 1;  
    end;  
}  
  
// Shop de suprimentos  
-	shop	mercado_supplies	-1,523:250,715:600,716:600,717:600,12006:2500,12005:2500,12006:2500,12007:2500,12008:2500,12009:2500,12010:2500,12011:2500,12012:2500,12013:2500,12014:2500,12015:2500,1065:100,7940:200,6144:1000,11513:250,18000:100,18001:200,18002:200,18003:200,18004:500,6145:10,12383:10000,100179:300,6147:100,970:5000,6210:600,6211:800,6212:1000,6213:500,6214:500,6215:500,6216:1000,6217:100000,7137:2000,7138:2000,13265:1500,13266:1500,13267:1500,13268:1500,13277:12000,13280:12000,13281:6000,13282:9000,13283:9000,6128:1000,12717:50000,12718:50000,12719:100000,12720:50000,12721:50000,12722:50000,12723:50000,12724:50000,6120:120,6123:200,1025:200,990:1000,991:1000,992:1000,993:1000,994:5000,995:5000,996:5000,997:5000,6360:200,6361:200,6362:200,6363:200
